task.title: Exploring the local file system
task.shortdesc: The remote systems view displays locations on your local file system. You can navigate in a local system from this view.

taskbody.prereq: To explore the local file system in the Remote Systems view, you must define a filter for the local system. This filter can be mapped to the root of the system or to a specific location on the system.

step.cmd: Select the file system that you want to explore by clicking the file system on the tree view.
step.stepresult: The content of the selected system expands as you continue to click the + symbols to expand.

step.cmd: Continue navigating until you find the file you are looking for.

step.stepresult: The properties information is displayed in the Properties view. If the correct version of the file is displayed, you can open the file for editing.
